name: Dominaria

draft.notes: Every pack contains at least one legendary creature via a dedicated legendary slot. That slot is rare 1/4 of the time (no separate normal rare then) and uncommon 3/4 of the time (a normal rare also present). When the legendary slot is rare there are 3 non-legendary uncommons, otherwise 2, so the pack still totals 3 uncommons + 1 rare. Common foils appear 1 in every 8 packs and displace a common.

statedRates: Common foils 1 in 8 packs. Legendary slot is rare exactly 1/4 of the time. 20 uncommon legendary creatures.
sourceNotes: Large set; first set of the era with only large sets. Four basic land variations. 36 packs per box. Printed in USA and Belgium.
